brief: Google's soaring AI costs, UK pub tax cuts, Houthi Red Sea attacks, and India's exam scandal dominate headlines, while new papers explore AI in clinical workflows and volume visualization.
news_summary: Google plans up to $190bn in AI investments; UK pubs get 20% business rate cut funded by vape shop surcharge; Houthis claim Red Sea tanker attacks; India's Modi promises to punish corrupt officials amid exam leak protests.
papers_summary: A HIPAA-compliant AI system for clinical assays and a neural Gaussian splatting approach for volume visualization highlight advances in healthcare and graphics.

en.brief: Google's soaring AI costs, UK pub tax cuts, Houthi Red Sea attacks, and India's exam scandal dominate headlines, while new papers explore AI in clinical workflows and volume visualization.
en.news_summary: Google plans up to $190bn in AI investments; UK pubs get 20% business rate cut funded by vape shop surcharge; Houthis claim Red Sea tanker attacks; India's Modi promises to punish corrupt officials amid exam leak protests.
en.papers_summary: A HIPAA-compliant AI system for clinical assays and a neural Gaussian splatting approach for volume visualization highlight advances in healthcare and graphics.

zh.brief: 今日新闻聚焦美沙核协议引发的核扩散担忧、英国女子在香港勒索案、TikTok直播带货风潮以及华语电影制片人施南生逝世；学术方面缺乏中文论文，英文论文涉及AI、视觉化等计算科学领域。
zh.news_summary: 美国与沙特签署核协议引发中东核扩散风险；英国女子在香港被控勒索和妨碍司法公正；TikTok直播带货在英国迅速流行；华语电影金牌制片施南生病逝。
zh.papers_summary: 无中文论文，英文论文主要围绕AI辅助临床工作流、边缘捆绑任务分类、多模态界面构建、生成式AI在痴呆症护理中的伦理考量等计算科学主题。
